rows.label: tev011601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Justin about BLADE's mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Justin about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Justin for his thoughts on
friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Justin about the enemy attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Justin about the battle
for the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0001
rows.name:
We were chosen from among tens of
billions of humans to board the
White Whale and leave our home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0003
rows.name:
We owe it to the countless lives
that perished on Earth to carry on
their legacy, no matter what comes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is our destiny! We have to safeguard the
genes we've carried since the birth of humanity
and pass them on to the next generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's why we came here to Mira,
and why we're searching so
doggedly for the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0006
rows.name:
It will not be easy, but with your help, we will
succeed. One day you'll use your power to destroy
a great evil and lead humanity to a bright future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0009
rows.name:
I've been searching for a great [ST:gender p1=hero p2=heroine ] since I was a
child, but never expected that one would appear
just in the nick of time to save me as you did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0010
rows.name:
I was so happy, I almost
burst into tears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ever since that day, I've felt that your
destiny is inexorably linked to my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0012
rows.name:
I believe that if we both pursue a
righteous path, our destinies will
one day merge in a significant way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0013
rows.name:
So continue pursuing your BLADE duties to kindle the fires
of justice that burn so brightly within you, and I'll
continue staking my life on my own fight for justice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0021
rows.name:
I heard from a Ma-non that it
was your team who rescued them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0022
rows.name:
Your deed has blazed a new trail
for humans and xenoforms to join
hands in peace and cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0023
rows.name:
You are every bit the hero I hoped
you were! I can't wait to see what
great feat you accomplish next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ah, but it is not enough for me to root
you on. I must work harder and become
a man worthy to stand at your side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0040
rows.name:
That enemy who led the attack...? Her name
was Riiz, I believe. Anyway, I heard that
you were the ones who chased her off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0041
rows.name:
It filled me with pride to hear that,
but also a strange sense of loneliness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0042
rows.name:
Why, you ask? Because it meant
my own personal [ST:gender p1=hero p2=heroine ] would now be
the savior of all of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0043
rows.name:
Your deed has elevated you far beyond the
likes of me. But that doesn't mean I've
strayed from my own path of righteousness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0044
rows.name:
One day I will perform a great
deed that will land me a spot
by your side. This I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0059
rows.name:
Luxaar has fallen. It seems like
a happy ending, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0060
rows.name:
Well, this was supposed to be a story
of your absolute righteousness triumphing
over the Growth's absolute evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0061
rows.name:
But your triumph was tarnished by
that BLADE's betrayal. Such insult
cannot be allowed to stand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0062
rows.name: And is it true that traitor still lives?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0063
rows.name:
He should have been put to death
immediately. I can't imagine
what BLADE HQ is thinking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Justin about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0064
rows.name:
Luxaar has fallen. It seems like
a happy ending, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0065
rows.name:
This was supposed to be a story of
your absolute righteousness triumphing
over the Growth's absolute evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0066
rows.name:
But your triumph was tarnished by
that BLADE's betrayal. Such insult
cannot be allowed to stand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0067
rows.name: And is it true that traitor still lives?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0068
rows.name:
He should have been put to death
immediately. I can't imagine
what BLADE HQ is thinking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0071
rows.name:
When we crash-landed on Mira,
it was a life-or-death battle
just to survive at first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0072
rows.name:
Everyone worked together to bring
NLA to life, and there wasn't
anyone committing weird crimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0073
rows.name:
But now that we're at peace and no longer
have to fight for our lives, more and more
people are losing their ethical compass.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0074
rows.name:
I will not allow these spoiled
wretches to ruin the sanctity of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0075
rows.name:
That's why I've joined the
Companion, the Union that
maintains order within the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011601_MSG0076
rows.name:
It may not provide the opportunity to become a great hero
like yourself, but I've devoted my life to the fight for
justice, and will do so for as long as I am able.[ST:wait ]
